results.rendered_html:
aparigraha a. Without possessions or belongings, attendants &c; quite
(pb) destitute, as in nirāśīraparigrahaḥ
— haḥ
1 Non-acceptance, rejection, renunciation, one of the several kinds of yamas (mental restraints) stated in Yoga Śāstra by Patañjali.
2 Destitution, poverty.
